title: senecio sagasteguii
intro: Senecio sagasteguii, also known as Sagastegui's groundsell, is a rare and endangered shrub native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Senecio sagasteguii include relief from pain, reduction of inflammation, and antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing and skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves are used in herbal remedies to address various health concerns.
